reason: Node 1.4.2 begins with 'Since π_φ(A)' is a finite-dimensional von Neumann algebra', which is the conclusion of Node 1.4.1. However, 1.4.2 declares no dependencies. It must list Node 1.4.1 as a dependency, since without 1.4.1 the premise of 1.4.2 is ungrounded. This is analogous to the existing challenge on 1.4.1 (which similarly failed to declare its dependency on 1.3). Without this dependency, the proof graph is structurally incomplete: a reader/verifier cannot trace the logical chain.
